name: claude-best-practice-evals
description: Behavioral evaluations for the claude-best-practice coaching skill

cases.name: explore-before-code
cases.input: Add a new API endpoint for user preferences
cases.expected_behavior: Claude explores existing endpoint patterns before planning, proposes a plan before coding, and identifies test cases before implementation
success_criteria: Reads existing endpoint files before writing new ones
Presents a plan to the user before any file edits
Defines verification criteria (tests or manual checks)

cases.name: verification-first
cases.input: The login form is broken, users can't sign in
cases.expected_behavior: Claude investigates the bug, identifies root cause, writes a failing test, fixes the issue, and verifies the test passes
success_criteria: Investigates and identifies root cause before fixing

cases.name: scope-separation
cases.input: Refactor the auth module and also update the deploy script while you're at it
cases.expected_behavior: Claude suggests handling these as separate tasks rather than mixing them in one context
success_criteria: Identifies the tasks as unrelated concerns
Suggests completing one before starting the other
Does not mix both tasks in a single implementation pass

cases.name: prompt-clarification
cases.expected_behavior: Claude asks clarifying questions about what 'better' means rather than guessing
success_criteria: Asks about specific dimensions (performance, UX, visual design, accessibility)
Does not immediately start making changes
